rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully achieved both task objectives. The agent log contains direct verification output showing: (1) insecure access rejected with 'ERROR: node is running secure mode, SSL connection required' (exit code 1), and (2) secure access via --certs-dir=/cockroach/cockroach-certs returning '1' (exit code 0). The approach was sound and complete: certificates were generated in the openssl-toolbox pod (CA, node, client.root), a Kubernetes secret was created with all 5 cert files, the StatefulSet was patched to replace --insecure with --certs-dir and switch probes to HTTPS, and all pods were restarted to pick up the new configuration. The automated oracle verdict is 'pass'. The regression sweep failures in stage_04 and stage_06 are pre-existing cluster-settings issues unrelated to this TLS migration task.
